texto: There is a saying that when someone is struck down without warning that he "didn't know what hit him." It's a bit of a copout, providing the excuse that what happened wasn't the individual's fault at all. That it couldn't have been avoided and no one is to blame.Frankly, that's just a bunch of hokey horseshit.
explicacao: Citação de Pete Kahle sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is a saying that when someone is struck down without warning that he "didn't know what hit …” articula reflexao, horror, karma em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como karma e the-specimen.
